claim_boundary: Benchmark anomaly evidence only. Buyer outcomes require real cycle-count feedback.

promotion_decision.reason: Champion profile has materially lower false-positive rate for cycle-count workload; balanced challenger remains in shadow to test whether higher recall is worth extra review volume.

limitations: FreshRetailNet is not U.S.-based and does not prove SMB merchant ROI.
The benchmark target is stockout-hour status, not buyer-confirmed anomaly outcome.
Cycle-count savings require real merchant feedback before they can be labeled measured.
